description: Add a fresh twist to your accessories this summer by wearing a classic adidas timepiece with updated design details. Sporty at heart but stylish on your wrist, this watch makes for a great buy! Case diameter: 46 mm Case thickness: 6 mm Dial shape: Round Warranty: 2 Years Black fixed bezel on a round plastic case Grooved plastic straps with a tang clasp Black dial with digital display Stop watch, light and alarm features Lap memory to record your runs Screw to reset time Solid stainless steel case back 5 ATM water resistance tested using the equivalent static depth rating, with resistance at 50 meters
